description: Product Description Masterplast Vapour Candle, releases a soothing menthol & eucalyptus vapour easing sinus and cold symptoms for cool clear breathing. Light the wick to gently release the fragrance to soothe and ease cold and flu congestion symptoms. Supplied with a secure screw lid to the candle jar, perfect for packing for holidays at home or abroad. Always ensure the candle has completely cooled before securing the lid back on the jar candle. Safety Warning Make sure the candle is completely cooled before covering it and keep it away from flammable materials. Never leave a candle unattended.
